common.toastNetwork: Network error. Check your connection and API URL.

analyzeHub.title: Review analysis
analyzeHub.subtitle: Search the store, bring your own file or pasted reviews, then compare apps when you are ready.
analyzeHub.noClerk: Add NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY and sign in to use store search and imports.
analyzeHub.searchLabel: Search app or paste store link / id
analyzeHub.searchPlaceholder: e.g. currency, com.whatsapp, or store link
analyzeHub.searchHint: Press Enter or Search. Pick Android, iOS, or both; results come from the store catalogs.
analyzeHub.noResultsGroup: No apps in this group for this search.
analyzeHub.resultsHeading: {count, plural, =0 {No matches} one {# app found} other {# apps found}}
analyzeHub.noResults: No apps matched. Try another keyword or switch platform.
analyzeHub.selectAppContinue: Select — create app and continue to import
analyzeHub.storeAppPinned: App pinned on this screen. Set the date range and pull reviews below.
analyzeHub.fetchCompletedHint: Pull finished — {count, plural, one {# review in your account} other {# reviews in your account}}. Start sentiment analysis below.
analyzeHub.estimatedTimeHint: This can take a few minutes depending on volume and server load.
analyzeHub.poolAppended: {count, plural, one {# line added to pool} other {# lines added to pool}}
analyzeHub.analyzeFooterDisabledHint: Choose a target app, add lines to the pool (file/text) or complete a store pull, then start.
analyzeHub.analyzeNeedAppForTextPool: Pooled reviews need a target app. Pick one above, or pin an app from the Store tab.
analyzeHub.storeReviewsPullFailed: Could not start the store review pull (server error). Try again later.
analyzeHub.storeReviewsHydrateFailed: Reviews could not be loaded into the pool: {detail}
analyzeHub.storeFetchPollFailed: Could not load import status from the server. Check your connection or try again.
analyzeHub.analyzeFooterNeedData: Add reviews to the pool or finish a store pull before starting analysis.
analyzeHub.fileTextIntro: Lines go into the shared pool. Use the bar at the bottom to run sentiment analysis on the pool (or after a completed store pull).
analyzeHub.sessionAppLinkedHint: Store tab pinned app “{name}” is selected as target.
analyzeHub.filePoolFooterHint: Parsed lines are appended to the pool. Use “Start sentiment analysis” at the bottom.
analyzeHub.textPoolFooterHint: Use “Load text into pool”, then start analysis from the bottom bar.
analyzeHub.appLinked: App added — open the app to run an import and analysis.
analyzeHub.storeFooter: Everything stays on this page: pick a result, pull reviews, then start analysis from the bottom bar.
analyzeHub.targetAppPlaceholder: Search, pick from list, or paste app UUID
analyzeHub.targetAppUnresolved: No matching app. Pick from the suggestions or enter a valid app UUID.
analyzeHub.noAppsYet: Create at least one app first.
analyzeHub.fileConstraints: Up to 200 MB · csv, tsv, txt, xlsx
analyzeHub.fileDropHint: Drag a file here or click to browse.
analyzeHub.fileParseEmpty: No review lines found in this file.
analyzeHub.fileParseFailed: Could not read this file. Try CSV UTF-8 or a simpler sheet.
analyzeHub.poolLineCount: {count, plural, one {# line ready} other {# lines ready}}
analyzeHub.compareHint: Use each column: pick a saved app, or search the store and choose a result. You can also tick apps in the list below. Start comparison opens the side-by-side view (new store picks create app records).
analyzeHub.compareApp1Label: App 1 — search or store link / id
analyzeHub.compareApp2Label: App 2 — search or store link / id
analyzeHub.compareSearchPlaceholder: e.g. trendyol, com.example, App Store ID, or store link
analyzeHub.compareRegisteredListHint: Tick column 1 or 2 to assign that app to a slot (same as the dropdowns above).
analyzeHub.compareRemoveSelectedAppAria: Remove selected app from this slot
analyzeHub.compareDateRangePoolHint: After both apps are set, use this range when you pull reviews on each app’s page. The compare view opens with the pair you chose.
analyzeHub.compareCreatedBoth: Created {a} and {b}. Opening the compare view.
analyzeHub.compareNeedBothSlots: Choose app 1 and app 2 (saved app or store result) before starting.
analyzeHub.compareSameAppTwice: Choose two different apps for comparison.
analyzeHub.compareOpenedRegistryPair: Opening compare with your saved apps.
analyzeHub.analyzeKickoffFailed: Import finished but analysis could not be queued — retry from the app page.
analyzeHub.searchNetworkHint: Usually no response from the API (backend down, wrong URL, mixed HTTP/HTTPS, or browser blocked a cross-origin request). Use Vercel BACKEND_ORIGIN with an empty NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL for same-origin proxy, or add this site's full URL to CORS_ORIGINS on Railway. Confirm the latest Railway deploy is healthy. If it persists: DevTools → Network (failed request URL) and Console (CORS line).
analyzeHub.apiUrlMissing: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL is not set. Requests go to this site instead of the FastAPI backend — set the URL in your deployment (e.g. Vercel env) or add a rewrite for /api/v1.
analyzeHub.fetchEventCreatedReason: The API accepted the request; the worker is being queued.
analyzeHub.fetchEventPendingReason: Waiting until the worker picks up this import job.
analyzeHub.fetchEventWorkerStartedReason: Collecting reviews via store API calls.
analyzeHub.fetchEventReviewsCountLabel: {count, plural, one {# review collected} other {# reviews collected}}
analyzeHub.fetchEventReviewsCountReason: The scraper keeps adding new reviews to the pool.
analyzeHub.fetchEventCompletedLabel: Import finished ({count, plural, one {# review} other {# reviews}})
analyzeHub.fetchEventCompletedReason: Store pull is done; you can move on to analysis.
analyzeHub.fetchEventFailedDefaultReason: The worker returned an error — check logs.
analyzeHub.fetchEventHydrateStartReason: Fetching the review list in pages and updating the pool counter.
analyzeHub.fetchEventHydrateCompleteLabel: UI pool updated ({count, plural, one {# row} other {# rows}})
analyzeHub.fetchEventHydrateCompleteReason: You can continue with the analysis button.
analyzeHub.fetchEventRequestSentReason: Waiting for the API to create the record and enqueue the worker.
analyzeHub.fetchHintRunningWithCount: Pulling reviews from the store… ({count} collected)
analyzeHub.fetchHintRunningNoCount: Pulling Google Play and App Store reviews…
analyzeHub.fetchHintCompleted: Pull finished ({count, plural, one {# review} other {# reviews}}). You can start analysis.
analyzeHub.localFirstHint: The first pull runs in your local market. You can start global research after analysis.

compare.emptyDescription: Pick two apps from Analyze → Compare, or open this page with ?app_a=UUID&app_b=UUID. PDF-style side-by-side charts will evolve here; you already get quick links and import status.
compare.pairSubtitle: Jump into each app, run imports, then open analytics. Exports are available on the analytics screen when analysis completes.
compare.invalidAppIds: Both app_a and app_b must be valid UUIDs from your account.
compare.loadPairFailed: Could not load one or both apps (missing or not owned).
compare.heuristicReadyHint: A completed heuristic analysis exists for this app (latest run).
compare.runHeuristicHint: After import completes, run analysis from the analytics page.
compare.splitViewHint: Split view shows both apps side by side: start a review pull in each column, watch import status, run analysis, and read compact charts without leaving this page.
compare.splitNoFetchYet: No import yet — submit the form above to pull reviews.
compare.splitReviewsFilterHint: Filters apply to reviews already loaded below — use “Load more” to pull additional pages from the server.
compare.splitReviewsEmpty: No reviews match this filter in the loaded sample yet.
compare.splitReviewsLoadError: Could not load reviews for this import.
compare.chartsLayoutHint: Wide charts use the full analytics layout inside each column (taller, more detail). Compact keeps charts stacked for narrow panes.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your connected apps and review imports.
dashboard.appsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No apps yet} one {# app} other {# apps}}
dashboard.noClerk: Add NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY and sign in to use the API from this dashboard.

apps.title: Apps
apps.listSubtitle: Manage Google Play and App Store connections.
apps.name: App name
apps.newSubtitle: Identifiers are used by the import worker (Oturum 4).
apps.validationBundle: Numeric App Store app ID is required when platform includes App Store.
apps.validationIconUrl: Enter a valid URL or leave empty.
apps.validationDates: End date must be on or after the start date.
apps.emptyDescription: Create an app to start importing store reviews.
apps.pairBannerIntro: You created this app together with {name}. Open the partner or compare both.
apps.deleteConfirm: Delete “{name}”? This also removes its reviews and analyses.
apps.duplicateRegistrationsHint: The same store identifiers were saved more than once. The apps list shows one card per store app; open or delete each extra registration here.

analysis.missingFetch: Open this page from an import row on the app screen (Analytics link).
analysis.pollHint: Import and analysis rows refresh about every 3 seconds while running.
analysis.fetchNotCompleted: Wait until the import finishes before running analysis.
analysis.noAnalysisYet: No results for this run yet.
analysis.analysesLoadError: Could not load analysis list for this app (404 or server error). Try refresh or confirm the API is deployed.
analysis.liveStatusPending: Queued, waiting for the scraper worker…
analysis.noReviewsInRange: No reviews for this range or source. Widen the date range or change the source selection.
analysis.noReviewsForFetch: No reviews to show for this import.
analysis.expandShowMore: Expand · show {count, plural, one {# more review} other {# more reviews}}
analysis.pdfWindowError: Could not open the PDF window.
analysis.timelineTruncatedHint: Charts use up to {loaded} of {total} reviews (performance cap).
analysis.timelineLoadError: Could not load reviews for timeline charts.
analysis.localResultNotice: These results belong to your local market.
analysis.globalUpsellHint: You can get broader insights with a global scan.
analysis.globalQueued: Global scan and analysis have been queued.
analysis.globalLangsHint: Select one or more languages. Global store reviews will focus on these languages.
analysis.globalTop30Hint: Deep research scans the top 30 global languages; it may take longer to complete for full coverage.
analysis.deepResearchStatusRunning: Deep research is running. Results will refresh automatically on this page when it finishes.
analysis.deepResearchStatusCompleted: Deep research completed. Global results are now ready.
analysis.deepResearchStatusFailed: Deep research did not complete successfully. You can retry it.

about.title: About Vivindis
about.p1: Vivindis pulls Google Play and App Store reviews, runs heuristic and optional AI analysis, and shows results in a structured dashboard.
about.p2: The Analyze hub mirrors a familiar single-screen workflow: store search, file and paste import, and a two-app creation step for comparison — built on FastAPI, Celery, and Next.js instead of Streamlit.
about.p3: Exports: completed analyses offer JSON and a flat CSV summary from the analytics page. PDF reports are not generated in-browser yet; use CSV/JSON or your own tooling.
about.p4: Secrets and API keys live only in environment variables on Railway and Vercel; never commit them to git.
